PIKCUBERUNMODIFIERS-GADGET.description:
{WhenGadget.StringValue}, {WhatGadget.StringValue}.
At the end of each combat, [gold]Scrap[/gold] a card to change what this relic does.
PIKCUBERUNMODIFIERS-GADGET.flavor: A lost relic of a former inventor. Longs to be endlessly tinkered with.
PIKCUBERUNMODIFIERS-GADGET.scrapKeyword: Choose one of three cards to remove from your deck. Favors cards you played in the most recent combat.
PIKCUBERUNMODIFIERS-GADGET.title: Gadget
